<a name="TerraformAccount"></a>
## type [TerraformAccount](<https://github.com/jbcom/secrets-sync/blob/main/cmd/secrets-sync/cmd/migrate.go#L82-L87>)

TerraformAccount represents an account mapping

```go
type TerraformAccount struct {
    Name      string `yaml:"name"`
    AccountID string `yaml:"account_id"`
    Region    string `yaml:"region,omitempty"`
    RoleARN   string `yaml:"role_arn,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="TerraformAccountsFile"></a>
## type [TerraformAccountsFile](<https://github.com/jbcom/secrets-sync/blob/main/cmd/secrets-sync/cmd/migrate.go#L100-L102>)

TerraformAccountsFile is the structure of accounts.yaml

```go
type TerraformAccountsFile struct {
    Accounts []TerraformAccount `yaml:"accounts"`
}
```

<a name="TerraformSecret"></a>
## type [TerraformSecret](<https://github.com/jbcom/secrets-sync/blob/main/cmd/secrets-sync/cmd/migrate.go#L73-L79>)

TerraformSecret represents a secret definition

```go
type TerraformSecret struct {
    Name       string            `yaml:"name"`
    VaultPath  string            `yaml:"vault_path"`
    VaultMount string            `yaml:"vault_mount,omitempty"`
    Keys       []string          `yaml:"keys,omitempty"`
    Transforms map[string]string `yaml:"transforms,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="TerraformSecretsFile"></a>
## type [TerraformSecretsFile](<https://github.com/jbcom/secrets-sync/blob/main/cmd/secrets-sync/cmd/migrate.go#L95-L97>)

TerraformSecretsFile is the structure of secrets.yaml

```go
type TerraformSecretsFile struct {
    Secrets []TerraformSecret `yaml:"secrets"`
}
```

<a name="TerraformTarget"></a>
## type [TerraformTarget](<https://github.com/jbcom/secrets-sync/blob/main/cmd/secrets-sync/cmd/migrate.go#L65-L70>)

TerraformTarget represents a target in terraform\-aws\-secretsmanager format

```go
type TerraformTarget struct {
    Name        string   `yaml:"name"`
    Description string   `yaml:"description,omitempty"`
    Imports     []string `yaml:"imports,omitempty"`
    Secrets     []string `yaml:"secrets,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="TerraformTargetsFile"></a>
## type [TerraformTargetsFile](<https://github.com/jbcom/secrets-sync/blob/main/cmd/secrets-sync/cmd/migrate.go#L90-L92>)

TerraformTargetsFile is the structure of targets.yaml

```go
type TerraformTargetsFile struct {
    Targets []TerraformTarget `yaml:"targets"`
}
```
